creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to alt2600 from comment #23)
> I think I can add DOCS, EXAMPLES, and VTK but I use VTK8 and not sure how to cleanly let the build system detect VTK>6 is fine, need to review the porters handbook a bit.
I have VTK9 installed, opencv found it and use as dependency check my PR: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=253118
I create patch for opencv with VTK option: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/attachment.cgi?id=222068&action=diff
This patch work fine for me on 12.2 amd64 with VTK9 - I can turn ON and OFF this option.
